name: Galaga
description: Galaga is a fixed shooter where the player controls a spaceship at the bottom of the screen. The player's primary objective is to defend against waves of alien attackers. These aliens enter the screen in formations from the top, typically engaging in dive-bombing attacks or firing projectiles. The player's spaceship can move horizontally along the bottom of the screen. The game features multiple stages, with increasing difficulty as the game progresses. After certain number of completed stages, there is a challenging stage where the player doesn't get to shoot the enemies, just dodge them. Some aliens, notably the Galaga Boss, have the ability to capture the player's ship with a tractor beam. If captured, the player can attempt to rescue their captured ship by shooting the Galaga Boss that is holding it. Successfully rescuing the captured ship results in the player controlling a dual-ship configuration, effectively doubling their firepower. However, this dual-ship has a larger hitbox, making it slightly more vulnerable. If the dual-ship takes a hit on either ship it goes back to single ship and if the single ship is hit the game is over. The enemies come in waves and in different forms and attacking patterns. They start at the top of the screen and dive down and shoot at the player. The player starts with a set number of lives, and the game ends when all lives are lost.
